title: The Sweetland
description: This mod adds a new explorable dimension to the game, The Sweetland, a world where almost everything is made out of candy.
body:
A new villager, the _Candy Seller_, made its appearance into the Minecraft World, and its main job is to sell candies to whoever wants to enjoy some sweet treats after a long day of working. After gaining the player's trust, a Candy Seller will share the secret to its success: all the candies on sale, in fact, come from another world, **The Sweetland**, a new dimension parallel to ours where almost everything is made out of sugar, and thus edible. To gain access to this new land you need a special item, sold by the Candy Seller itself along with a practical guide that will lead the player through the discovery of The Sweetland and its secrets. This bizarre dimension is very much like the Overworld: it has mountains and oceans and it's full of life, which also resembles most of the wildlife that thrives in our world: sheep, cows and chickens are commonly found in the region, as well as other mobs which share a few more differencies with ours; still, each living entity found in the Sweetland has some very unique peculiarities which differ it from its regular counterparts in the Overworld. While exploring this new world, however, you constantly need to check your blood sugar through the new glycemia bar and make sure it doesn't go up too much: if it increases over the safe level, you'll start experiencing some illnesses like weakness and nausea attacks, and you could even wither to death. Glycemia fades over time, but in order to keep it low you mustn't exaggerate with sweet foods, and if you are so gluttonous that you can't help yourself as a last resource you can use a syringe of insulin, which will immediately decrease the level of sugar in your body.

That said, good luck exploring the new world and have fun!
